name: BB:FalsePositive: Virus Definition Update Categories
notes: Edit this BB to define all the false positive QIDs that occur to or from virus definition or other automatic update hosts that are defined in the BB:HostDefinition: Virus Definition and Other Update Servers building block.
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: Virus Definition Update Categories on events which are detected by the undefined system
BB:HostDefinition: Virus Definition and Other Update Servers
conditions_text: when we see an event match any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Virus Definition and Other Update Servers
where the Event Category for the event is one of the following (key not found: Recon), (key not found: Suspicious)
TD_list: APPLY BB:FalsePositive: Virus Definition Update Categories on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND when we see an event match any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Virus Definition and Other Update Servers
AND where the Event Category for the event is one of the following (key not found: Recon), (key not found: Suspicious)
